name: the same name mentioned twice in one note yields one entity
description: Adversarial duplicate-mention probe. One extraction lists the SAME mention name ('Cleo') three times (identical name+kind, varying surface_text) plus one fact. resolve_entity is called once per DISTINCT name (pipeline._resolve_entities dedupes into `names`), so exactly one provisional Cleo is minted — not three. _rebuild_mentions wipes-and-reinserts this note's mentions, anchoring each surface; the fact attaches to the single entity. Pins clean dedupe: one Cleo entity, one active fact, no duplicate entities from repeated mentions.

steps.body: Cleo called. Then Cleo texted. Later, Cleo emailed about the trip to Lisbon.

facts.statement: Cleo is planning a trip to Lisbon.
